description: The ReferenceProxy component is used to make a grabbed item this is on act as the reference this refers to. This is also generated when a reference in an Scene Inspector is grabbed in the form of a block of text showing the reference and its id.

fields.Reference: The reference this component should point to for grabbable objects, making them like inspector grab cards.
fields.SpawnInstanceOnTrigger: Whether to spawn an inspector when clicking primary with the grabbable this is on is being held.

usage: Attach to a slot with an IGrabbable to make the grabbable act as the reference value itself.
